title: Military suit
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Military_Suit.jpg|thumb|150px|[[Carth Onasi]] wearing a military suit]]
The '''military suit''' was a standard-issue type of medium [[Armor/Legends|armor]] that saw widespread use in the days of the [[Mandalorian Wars]], [[Jedi Civil War]] and [[Dark Wars]]. While the suit was heavier and more restrictive than some of its counterparts, it was sturdy and afforded solid protection. For this reason, it was a popular choice of armor for many [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]], who found the trade-off tolerable. [[Brejik]], the leader of the [[Black Vulkars/Legends|Black Vulkars]], wore such a suit of armor when he was killed during a brief fight against [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] and [[Bastila Shan]] in the wake of the [[Tarisian Season Opener]] [[Swoop racing/Legends|swoop race]] of [[3956 BBY]].

==Appearances==
*[[Knights of the Old Republic 22|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 22]]
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''
